summary: Comprehensive testing of Lumo Entretenimiento landing page completed. All backend APIs working (100%), all frontend features working (100%). Modal overlay issue from iteration_1 has been FIXED.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: Backend API: GET /api/health - returns healthy status
Backend API: POST /api/contact - creates contact with all fields
Backend API: POST /api/contact - creates contact with minimal required fields
Backend API: POST /api/contact - validation rejects missing name/email/artist_type
Backend API: GET /api/contacts - returns list of all contacts
Hero section with video background (video src correctly set)
Stats section showing +200, +50, +1M with labels
Navigation bar (fixed position, all nav links work)
Navigation smooth scroll to sections (Servicios, Paquetes, Artistas)
Services section with 4 service cards in grid layout
Infrastructure section with Buffalo Azul Studios alliance
Pricing section with 3 packages ($22,000, $35,000, $55,000)
Savings comparison table with all rows
Artists section with 8 artist cards (Costel and Tenampa with images)
Contact form modal - opens, fills, submits successfully (FIXED from iteration_1)
Footer contact form - fills and submits successfully
Social media links (Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Facebook) - all present with correct URLs
WhatsApp floating button visible in bottom right corner
Mobile responsive navigation (hamburger menu opens/closes)
Mobile layout for hero, services, pricing sections
critical_code_review_comments: Add DialogDescription to modal for accessibility (aria-describedby warning)
Consider adding loading state indicator for hero video on slow connections
seed_data_creation: Test contacts created via API tests and UI tests (prefixed with test emails)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Modal overlay issue from iteration_1 has been fixed with max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto on DialogContent. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_lumo_api.py cover all API endpoints. Video is 34MB and loads correctly - do not flag video loading issues in Playwright as bugs.

verified_fixes_from_iteration_1.modal_overlay_issue: FIXED - Submit button now clickable, form submits successfully and shows success toast
verified_fixes_from_iteration_1.css_classes: All CSS classes present (hero-section, nav-fixed, services-grid, pricing-grid, comparison-table, social-icon, whatsapp-float)
verified_fixes_from_iteration_1.whatsapp_button: WhatsApp floating button visible and functional
